name: Clam Chowder- New England Home Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crispy, then drain on paper towels and reserve the drippings.
2. In a separate pan, sauté the onion in the reserved drippings until it becomes tender.
3. Set aside the cooked onion.
4. In a pot, combine the potato, water, salt, and pepper. Cook until the potato is tender.
5. Stir in the minced clams, milk, and butter. Heat thoroughly until everything is combined and heated through.
6. Crumble the cooked bacon and sprinkle it over each serving.
